message:
feat(mux): add idle quality keyframe after activity bursts

When AIMD degrades quality during heavy terminal output, the user was
stuck with a blurry/blocky screen until the next periodic keyframe
(every 600 frames = ~20s). Now, after 15 consecutive unchanged frames
(~0.5s at 30 FPS), a one-shot quality keyframe is forced so the screen
sharpens quickly after activity stops. The flag resets when new content
arrives, allowing the next idle period to trigger another keyframe.
